title: TestEndToEndOverStdio conditionally skipped in -short mode
evidence: e2e_test.go:18 t.Skip("skipping binary build in -short mode")
suggestion: Acceptable conditional skip for CI speed, but note it reduces effective tests by 1 in short mode

title: Test coverage score is 33.7% despite all tests passing
suggestion: Add tests for edge cases in loader.go (malformed CSV rows, BOM handling) and store.go (empty filters, boundary conditions) to increase coverage

title: Zero external dependencies — pure standard library implementation
evidence: go.mod has no require directives; go.sum absent. MCP server, CSV parsing, JSON-RPC all implemented from scratch
suggestion: This is a strength — reduces supply chain risk and build complexity

title: ATDD prompt fully followed — acceptance tests drive through MCP protocol
evidence: acceptance_test.go:55 startSession() uses io.Pipe to create real MCP client; all 24 acceptance tests use domain language and assert on WHAT not HOW
suggestion: Exemplary adherence to the ATDD methodology specified in the prompt factor

title: Cross-file deduplication and source-priority system prevents double-counting
evidence: internal/store/loader.go:104-139 implements season-level source precedence and exact-duplicate guard
suggestion: Goes beyond spec — handles a real-world data quality issue that many implementations miss
